'''woshadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:meandriform|meandriform]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meandriform|meandriform]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| woshadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:woshadithi|woshadithi]] || [[word:woshadiji|woshadiji]] || [[word:woshadishi|woshadishi]] || [[word:woshadiki|woshadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:woshaduthuthu|woshaduthuthu]] || [[word:woshadujuju|woshadujuju]] || [[word:woshadushushu|woshadushushu]] || [[word:woshadukuku|woshadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:woshaduthu|woshaduthu]] || [[word:woshaduju|woshaduju]] || [[word:woshadushu|woshadushu]] || [[word:woshaduku|woshaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:woshadufthuf|woshadufthuf]] || [[word:woshadufjuf|woshadufjuf]] || [[word:woshadufshuf|woshadufshuf]] || [[word:woshadufkuf|woshadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:woshadethe|woshadethe]] || [[word:woshadeje|woshadeje]] || [[word:woshadeshe|woshadeshe]] || [[word:woshadeke|woshadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:woshadothotho|woshadothotho]] || [[word:woshadojojo|woshadojojo]] || [[word:woshadoshosho|woshadoshosho]] || [[word:woshadokoko|woshadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:woshadotho|woshadotho]] || [[word:woshadojo|woshadojo]] || [[word:woshadosho|woshadosho]] || [[word:woshadoko|woshadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:woshadofthof|woshadofthof]] || [[word:woshadofjof|woshadofjof]] || [[word:woshadofshof|woshadofshof]] || [[word:woshadofkof|woshadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:woshadïfthïf|woshadïfthïf]] || [[word:woshadïfjïf|woshadïfjïf]] || [[word:woshadïfshïf|woshadïfshïf]] || [[word:woshadïfkïf|woshadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:woshadïfthïfthïf|woshadïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:woshadïfjïfjïf|woshadïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:woshadïfshïfshïf|woshadïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:woshadïfkïfkïf|woshadïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:woshadïfthïf|woshadïfthïf]] || [[word:woshadïfjïf|woshadïfjïf]] || [[word:woshadïfshïf|woshadïfshïf]] || [[word:woshadïfkïf|woshadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:woshadïfthïf|woshadïfthïf]] || [[word:woshadïfjïf|woshadïfjïf]] || [[word:woshadïfshïf|woshadïfshïf]] || [[word:woshadïfkïf|woshadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:woshadæthæ|woshadæthæ]] || [[word:woshadæjæ|woshadæjæ]] || [[word:woshadæshæ|woshadæshæ]] || [[word:woshadækæ|woshadækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:woshadathatha|woshadathatha]] || [[word:woshadajaja|woshadajaja]] || [[word:woshadashasha|woshadashasha]] || [[word:woshadakaka|woshadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:woshadatha|woshadatha]] || [[word:woshadaja|woshadaja]] || [[word:woshadasha|woshadasha]] || [[word:woshadaka|woshadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:woshadafthaf|woshadafthaf]] || [[word:woshadafjaf|woshadafjaf]] || [[word:woshadafshaf|woshadafshaf]] || [[word:woshadafkaf|woshadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:woshadasha|woshadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:woshadshësha|woshadshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:woshadrosha|woshadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:woshadmusha|woshadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:woshadyasha|woshadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowoshadnkshësha|gowoshadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowoshadnkrosha|gowoshadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowoshadnkmusha|gowoshadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowoshadnkyasha|gowoshadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:woshashadasha|woshashadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:woshashadshësha|woshashadshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:woshashadrosha|woshashadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:woshashadmusha|woshashadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:woshashadyasha|woshashadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowoshashadnkshësha|gowoshashadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowoshashadnkrosha|gowoshashadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowoshashadnkmusha|gowoshashadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowoshashadnkyasha|gowoshashadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:weshædasha|weshædasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:weshædshësha|weshædshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:weshædrosha|weshædrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:weshædmusha|weshædmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:weshædyasha|weshædyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goweshædnkshësha|goweshædnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goweshædnkrosha|goweshædnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goweshædnkmusha|goweshædnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goweshædnkyasha|goweshædnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:woshfadasha|woshfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:woshfadshësha|woshfadshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:woshfadrosha|woshfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:woshfadmusha|woshfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:woshfadyasha|woshfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowoshfadnkshësha|gowoshfadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowoshfadnkrosha|gowoshfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowoshfadnkmusha|gowoshfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowoshfadnkyasha|gowoshfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
